Galan Lithium Limited ( (AU:GLN) ) has shared an announcement.

Galan Lithium has issued 1,602,484 fully paid ordinary shares following the exercise of unlisted options on 27 April 2026. The company has confirmed that these shares were issued without a prospectus, relying on provisions of the Corporations Act that allow on-sale of such securities under an exemption.

The board stated that Galan remains compliant with financial reporting and continuous disclosure obligations under the Corporations Act. By lodging the required notice with the ASX, it has ensured the new shares can be freely traded, providing clarity and legal certainty for investors and supporting liquidity in the company’s stock.

More about Galan Lithium Limited

Galan Lithium Limited is an Australian resources company focused on lithium, a key battery mineral used in electric vehicles and energy storage. Listed on the ASX, the company issues fully paid ordinary shares as part of its capital management and funding strategy to support ongoing project development and corporate activities.

Argo Investments Limited ( (AU:ARG) ) has provided an announcement.

Argo Investments reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $10.55 per share as at Friday, 24 April 2026, compared with a share price of $8.64 at the market close. The figures, which are unaudited and approximate, highlight a gap between Argo’s underlying asset value and its market valuation, a dynamic closely watched by investors in listed investment companies.

The release also reiterates Argo’s investment proposition, emphasising a diversified and administratively simple structure, low fees through internal management, and a strong, debt-free balance sheet overseen by an experienced board and management team. For income-focused investors, the company underscores its record of fully franked, sustainable dividends and its long-term, proven investment approach, positioning Argo as a conservative vehicle for broad Australian equity exposure.

More about Argo Investments Limited

Argo Investments Limited is one of Australia’s oldest and largest listed investment companies, founded in Adelaide in 1946 and now a member of the ASX 100. The internally managed LIC oversees a diversified portfolio of more than $8 billion on behalf of around 90,000 shareholders, focusing on low-cost, long-term investing and delivering fully franked, sustainable dividends backed by a debt-free balance sheet.

data.title: Bio-Gene Advances Flavocide Safety Studies as Qcide Deal Targets Japan’s $1bn Pest Market
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bio-Gene Technology Ltd. ( (AU:BGT) ) has provided an update.

Bio-Gene Technology is progressing two major regulatory studies for its Flavocide natural insecticide, including an extended one-generation reproductive toxicity study in rats and an acute neurotoxicity study, both conducted under OECD and GLP standards to support Australian and international approvals. The company remains on track to submit its first Flavocide registration application to the Australian Pesticides & Veterinary Medicines Authority in March 2027, while advancing Qcide commercialisation through a non-binding term sheet with Sumitomo Corporation and Nakashima Trading for Japan’s US$1 billion household pest market and expanding plantation capacity in far north Queensland.

The Flavocide reproductive toxicity study is expected to complete its in-life phase in July 2026 with reports through November, and the neurotoxicity study is due to deliver preliminary findings in May 2026. These studies will underpin Bio-Gene’s mammalian toxicology dossier under the OECD Mutual Acceptance of Data framework, potentially enabling streamlined submissions across major markets including the U.S., Europe and Asia, and reinforcing the company’s bid to carve out a differentiated position in safer, nature-derived insect control solutions.

Alongside regulatory work, Bio-Gene completed its 15th Qcide harvest and expects newly planted areas to be ready for first harvest in spring 2026. This growing supply base supports the targeted late-2026 launch of Qcide-containing household pest products in Japan, signalling a transition from development toward early commercial revenues and offering a clearer pathway for value creation for partners and shareholders.

More about Bio-Gene Technology Ltd.

Bio-Gene Technology Limited is an Australian agtech company focused on developing next-generation insecticides derived from natural sources. Its primary products include the Flavocide active ingredient and Qcide-based formulations, targeting public health, consumer and household pest control markets in Australia, Japan and other major international jurisdictions.

Average Trading Volume: 114,860

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$11.59M

See more insights into BGT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

EBOS Group Limited ( (AU:EBO) ) has issued an announcement.

EBOS Group Limited has announced that 7,878 performance rights granted under its equity incentive arrangements have lapsed. Following this change, the company now has 1,435,236 performance rights remaining on issue, slightly reducing potential future dilution for existing shareholders and refining the structure of its long‑term incentive pool.

An announcement from Axington Inc. ( (SG:XHV) ) is now available.

Serial Achieva’s subsidiary Achieva Cloud Services has won a major contract to supply advanced high-performance networking switches designed to support AI-optimised infrastructure. The deal includes an initial batch worth about US$4.7 million, with a committed follow-on purchase that could lift the total contract value to as much as US$18.8 million, signalling deeper expansion into higher-growth AI and high-performance computing segments.

Management framed the agreement as a strategic milestone that validates Serial Achieva’s push into the AI and high-performance computing value chain. By leveraging its established distribution network and regional partnerships, the company aims to enhance its enterprise capabilities and capture rising demand for next-generation infrastructure, which could strengthen its competitive positioning in Asia’s evolving IT hardware market.

More about Axington Inc.

Serial Achieva Limited is a regional distributor of consumer and enterprise IT products, operating primarily in Singapore and Malaysia. Partnering with major brands such as Intel, Gigabyte, AMD and ViewSonic, it offers a wide range of hardware including desktop CPUs, motherboards, graphics cards and gaming laptops, supported by strong warehousing and direct distribution to retailers and system integrators.

Australian Foundation Investment Co. Ltd. ( (AU:AFI) ) has provided an announcement.

Australian Foundation Investment Company has released an updated estimate of its net tangible asset backing per share as at 24 April 2026, reporting a pre-tax NTA of $7.79. The company’s shares closed on the ASX at $6.62 on the same date, indicating that the stock is trading at a discount to its indicative asset backing.

The pre-tax NTA figure is unaudited and indicative, calculated using the market value of the company’s investment portfolio before allowing for deferred tax on unrealised gains or losses. This update provides investors with a snapshot of AFIC’s underlying asset value and a reference point for assessing the current market pricing of its shares relative to its portfolio value.

More about Australian Foundation Investment Co. Ltd.
